channel.title: L Shaped on KRI
channel.description: Recent content in L Shaped on KRI

item.title: Small 11X7 L Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Small 11X7 Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 86 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design. It features a twin conductor with a 15’ cold lead and is available in two voltage options and a range of lengths to meet the requirements of any installation.

item.title: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen with Island
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen with Island Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 215 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Roll: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.

item.title: Modern L Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Modern L Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 136 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler. Who wouldn’t enjoy the comfort of a WarmlyYours radiant in-floor heating system in their home?
